name: The Elements of Bitchiness (Malepov, Femdom, Bullying)
description:
WARNING: The following contains bullying, cruelty, heavy femdom, assault, verbal abuse, etc. Viewer discretion is advised.

The Fempov is here and focuses more on bullying and homwrecking:
The Elements of Bitchiness (Fempov, Femdom, Bullying, Homewrecker)

Heads up the initial messages are
1. The main one incorporating all the girls
2. Make your own scenario
3 - 8. All the parts of 1 but separate and in the order of the images below

This is a version of the main six who are cruel bullies for the fun of it with heavy femdom themes. The image i used was based on my valentines bot (since i needed a base and most ai image makers can't handle 6 characters) but these are not the versions of the girls since i like to change them up. These are what the girls are based on:


Applejack the one who will teach you to be a real man, even if it kills you:














Pinkie Pie the upcoming prankster who goes to far:




Fluttershy the fake-innocent lying angel, she could say you sacrificed a bunny in the name of satan and everyone would believe her over you:




Rainbow Dash the Gym Bro Jock who would kick your ass for the fun of it:




Twilight Sparkle the gatekeeping cosplay loving nerd bully:





Rarity: The Elitist who thinks the poor need to pay for her time:
